assumptions.assumption: Most high-value AOF command choices can be grouped into a small number of intent categories.
assumptions.break_test_question: Do major operator tasks still require full-reference reading even after taxonomy grouping?

assumptions.assumption: Recognition packets should carry summary routing information, not the full CLI reference.
assumptions.break_test_question: Can an AI choose the right operator path from registry metadata without the full CLI reference?

assumptions.assumption: Current command naming is consistent enough that taxonomy can be layered without renaming commands.
assumptions.break_test_question: Are there too many ambiguous commands to classify reliably without semantic renaming?

assumptions.assumption: The next release can improve discoverability faster than adding more execution capability.
assumptions.break_test_question: Would operators get more value from new execution capability than from lower command-routing cost?
